news.title: Gloednieuw sterrenrestaurant Komaf debuteert op Antwerpen Proeft: “Zelfs in een kartonnen bakje smaakt het fantastisch” - HLN
news.summary:
# Summary

Komaf, a newly opened Michelin-starred restaurant, is making its debut at Antwerpen Proeft (Antwerp's food festival) and has already impressed critics—even when serving its refined cuisine in simple cardboard containers. This is significant for visitors to Antwerp because it showcases the city's growing fine dining scene and offers a chance to experience high-quality gastronomy at the festival. The positive reception suggests Komaf is worth seeking out for those looking for excellent food experiences in the city.

news.title: Bart (41) en Sally (37) keren terug naar Antwerpen met gastronomische wijnbar Krijt: “Alles is zelfgemaakt, van de charcuterie tot vers gebakken brood” - pzc.nl
news.summary:
# Summary

Bart and Sally, a couple in their 40s, have opened a new gastronomic wine bar called Krijt in Antwerp, where everything is made in-house including charcuterie and fresh-baked bread. This is a notable addition to Antwerp's dining scene because it combines quality wine service with an entirely homemade food menu. Visitors to the city looking for an upscale yet artisanal dining experience with authentic, house-made cuisine would find this establishment worth checking out.
